title: Uncraftable Fwaystones
description: A mod that makes all items from Wraith Waystones uncraftable.
body:
![Uncraftable Fwaystones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90b24efa709ef44b31d1214740da12df9f8775bb.png)

## Description
Do you love [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones), but only want the feature of generated waystones?  This is a small mod that makes all craftable items from Wraith Waystones uncraftable, limiting functionality and making waystones feel more special when they are found.

### Features:
- All crafting recipes from Wraith Waystones removed
- Does not remove any items
- Requires [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) to be installed

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
